data.title: Tracking transactions ‘very important’ for Belarus as it eyes digital ruble launch in 2026
data.description:
Issuing a digital ruble is a government priority in Belarus and the plan is to have it ready by the end of next year, a high-ranking central bank official has indicated. While “actively working” on its development, the authorities in Minsk are placing an emphasis on one particular feature – the design should allow them […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tracking-transactions-very-important-for-belarus-as-it-eyes-digital-ruble-launch-in-2026/

data.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson unbothered by White House crypto roundtable snub, continues to back Trump
data.description:
In March, the White House held a digital assets summit in the State Dining Room and it was attended by several founders except Charles Hoskinson, the co-founder of Ethereum and Cardano, and many found it odd. After all, there were expectations that Cardano’s token would be included in a crypto strategic reserve. Hoskinson has shrugged […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hoskinson-unbothered-white-house-crypto-snub/

data.title: Why Are Solana Traders Betting On More Price Upside?
data.description:
Solana (SOL) price has recently shown promising signs, as many crypto traders have been expecting a continued upward trend. According to recent data, 71. 87% of traders on Binance holding open Solana positions are betting on a price increase
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/18/why-are-solana-traders-betting-on-more-price-upside/

data.title: Interoperability Protocol Asset Surges After a16z Acquires $55,000,000 Worth of the Project’s Native Asset
data.description:
An under-the-radar altcoin witnessed a mild jump in price on Thursday after the venture capital giant Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) announced it was investing $55 million in the token. Ali Yahya, a general partner at a16z crypto, announced the investment in ZRO, the native token of the omnichain interoperability protocol LayerZero.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/18/interoperability-protocol-asset-surges-after-a16z-acquires-55000000-worth-of-the-projects-native-asset/

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Moved to Notorious LA Prison That Housed Al Capone, Charles Manson
data.description:
Bankman-Fried’s transfer to Terminal Island, once home to figures like Al Capone and Charles Manson, comes amid his growing conservative media presence and speculation about his long-term legal strategy.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bankman-fried-transferred-terminal-island-prison/

data.title: China halts its purchase of U.S. liquified natural gas
data.description:
China has stopped buying liquefied natural gas (LNG) from the United States, halting cargoes for more than ten weeks and widening the effects of the Sino‑American trade conflict to energy supplies. Since a 69,000‑tonne tanker from Corpus Christi, Texas, reached the south‑eastern province of Fujian on 6 February, no other U. S. LNG vessel has docked […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-halts-purchase-of-us-lng/

data.title: Trump tariffs could finally turn Bitcoin into an inflation hedge, Messari analyst says
data.description:
“Over time, we believe [tariffs] could lead to Bitcoin decoupling from U. S. equities. "
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/trump-tariffs-could-finally-turn-bitcoin-into-an-inflation-hedge-messari-analyst-says

data.title: Solana (SOL) Gains 13% In One Week But Stalls Below Key $136 Resistance
data.description:
Solana (SOL) has climbed 13% over the past seven days, showcasing strong short-term performance. While momentum indicators like the RSI and EMA lines remain supportive, recent price action suggests that bullish strength may be stalling just below a key breakout point. At the same time, the sharp drop in BBTrend indicates weakening trend strength and fading volatility, often a sign of incoming consolidation or market indecision. With technicals at a crossroads, SOL’s next move will likely depend on whether buyers can regain control or if a broader pullback begins to unfold
source: https://beincrypto.com/solana-gains-stalls-below-key-resistance/

data.title: Tokenized real estate opens up opportunity for everyone, says Altitude DP execs
data.description:
Nikolai Yinger and Yegor Kozubenko explain how tokenization gives more people access to real estate.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/tokenized-real-estate-opens-up-opportunity-for-everyone

data.title: Trump’s Return Could Ignite Crypto Market Growth, CleanSpark CEO Predicts After SEC Shift
data.description:
CleanSpark’s CEO credited recent U. S. policy changes under Trump for renewed institutional interest in Bitcoin. With SEC custody guidance repealed and new mining ventures emerging, CleanSpark eyes long-term crypto growth.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trumps-second-term-is-net-positive-cleanspark-ceo-says/
